JerryZLiu/Dayflow ·GitHub ⭐ 5834 Swift · Productivity, Time Tracking, Privacy, macOS, AI Summarization, Open Source

What it is

Dayflow is a macOS application that automatically tracks and categorizes your screen activity to generate a private daily timeline. It uses AI to summarize your work while prioritizing local processing for data privacy.

Problems solved

  • Manual activity logging
  • Privacy concerns with cloud-based productivity trackers
  • Lack of clear overview of daily work focus

How to get started

Install the macOS app and grant necessary permissions for screen and activity tracking. Review the automatically generated timeline at the end of the day or export it for further analysis.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

JerryZLiu/Dayflow is positioned as a dayflow is a macos application that automatically tracks and categorizes your screen activity to generate a private daily timeline. it uses ai to summarize your work while prioritizing local processing for data privacy. It aims to provide developers with a robust, Swift-based solution for turn your screen into a timeline of your workday. 1-click standups, perf review receipts, and beautiful time visualizations. local ai or byo key.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Traditional methods in this domain often suffer from Manual activity logging. JerryZLiu/Dayflow addresses this by dayflow is a macos application that automatically tracks and categorizes your screen activity to generate a private daily timeline. it uses ai to summarize your work while prioritizing local processing for data privacy, offering a significant performance boost and better developer ergonomics compared to existing alternatives.

3. Technical Architecture

The project is built using Swift, adopting a modular and scalable design. It leverages modern industry standards to ensure compatibility across different environments, focusing on efficiency and ease of integration.

Main logic revolves around turn your screen into a timeline of your workday. 1-click standups, perf review receipts, and beautiful time visualizations. local ai or byo key. 5. Code Organization

The repository is structured logically, with core functionality separated from utilities and examples. This organization facilitates easy navigation and contribution for developers looking to extend the tool's capabilities.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

To get started, install the macos app and grant necessary permissions for screen and activity tracking. review the automatically generated timeline at the end of the day or export it for further analysis. This will allow you to quickly evaluate the tool and integrate it into your existing development workflow.

7. Summary

An essential, Swift-powered utility that streamlines turn your screen into a timeline of your workday. 1-click standups, perf review receipts, and beautiful time visualizations. local ai or byo key; it effectively tackles Manual activity logging while maintaining a high standard of code quality and usability.
